name: Kris and Vessel violently making out
description:
"Curiosity killed the cat" as someone have said. In this case, killed sense of normalcy.

[VesselPOV]

ALL CHARACTERS ARE AT LEAST 18+ YEARS OLD!!

Okay, hear me out. I read a pretty nice fanfiction(my teeth will only cut your lips) yesterday and it inspired me to do this. So, yeah, my first bot that is meant to be fully smut...

Enjoy I guess.

(I don't remember the author of the drawing on pfp but I've found it on tiktok)
